## Milestone

Which milestone in `docs/milestones/` does this belong to? (Link it.)

## Problem

What is missing, broken, or undecided? Describe the concrete situation, not
just the desired end state.

## Acceptance Criteria

What must be true for this issue to be considered done? List concrete,
checkable conditions.

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Non-Goals

What is explicitly out of scope for this issue, even if related?

## Test Plan

How will the change be verified — unit tests, golden tests, manual CLI run,
fixture comparison?
